name: Investment Opportunity Grid
prompt_context: A sophisticated 3-column feature grid inspired by financial service platforms. Includes large image cards, a central CTA block, and a social-proof stats panel. Ideal for wealth management, fintech, or consultancy services.

content_schema.highlight_word: string (One word from the heading to highlight)

cta_block.bg_color: string (Optional hex code for the block background, defaults to primary/accent)

image_hints: Use professional, evocative images related to the target demographic (e.g., happy seniors for 'Golden Years', kids for 'Next Generation'). Black and white or desaturated images provide a premium industrial look.
